defs: stove stand; grate (supporting a pot over the stove)
lit. the stove fire has turned bright green (allusion to Daoist alchemy) (idiom)
fig. (of an art, a technique etc) brought to the point of perfection
Luhuo county (Tibetan: brag 'go rdzong) in Garze Tibetan autonomous prefecture 甘孜藏族自治州[Gan1 zi1 Zang4 zu2 zi4 zhi4 zhou1], Sichuan (formerly in Kham province of Tibet)
